---
name: Spec question or design defect
about: A spec is unclear, contradicts itself, or doesn't cover a real scenario
title: "[spec] "
labels: spec
assignees: ''
---

## Which spec(s)?

<!-- e.g., capsule-spec.md, permission-model.md. Link or quote the section. -->

## What's the issue?

<!-- Be specific. "Section X says Y but section Z says ¬Y", or "scenario A isn't expressible via the primitives in spec B", or "field C is referenced but never defined". -->

## What were you trying to do?

<!-- The use case that surfaced the question. Helps us understand whether the fix is a clarification, a real spec addition, or a vocabulary issue. -->

## Proposed resolution (if any)

<!-- Optional. If you have an opinion on how to fix it, share it. -->

## Have you checked?

- [ ] `extensibility.md` — your scenario isn't already covered by an extension point
- [ ] `scenarios.md` — your scenario isn't already in the canonical set
- [ ] Other Issues and Discussions — this hasn't been raised already
